Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Or Limit Deposition Subpoenas For Business Records;
Off Calendar Nov-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DARCI E. BURRELL, TEL. NO. (510) 318-7704 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KATHLEEN DARMAGNAC OF THE LAW OFFICES OF STUBBS & LEONE, TEL. NO. (925) 974-8600 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF JEFFREY L. SEARCY'S Motion to Quash Or Limit Deposition Subpoenas For Business Records ( PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYMENT RECORDS) is granted in part and denied in part. The records called for in paragraph B of the subpoenas as well as records of disability or workers' compensation claims must be produced to the extent they relate to the period of June 2009 to the present. No sanctions was granted. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Not reported = (301/PJB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2010 Set For Trial On Apr-25-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-08-11 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 604
